programme.title: MeatEater - Nebraska Whitetails
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head to Nebraska's Sandhills for a whitetail deer hunt, guided by Jordan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with spearfishing champions Danny Bolton and Kimi Werner.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose
programme.desc: In this episode of MeatEater, Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head into Alaska's remote interior.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Black Bear
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve introduces Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack in Prince of Wales, Alaska where they fish for cod, set shrimp pots and hunt for black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Michigan Squirrels and Rabbits
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve jets off to his home state of Michigan to hunt for small game with friends Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mule Deer
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: Salón México
programme.desc: Mercedes (Marga Lopez) dances for money with the clients of Salon Mexico, a famous cabaret in Mexico City. Her younger sister Beatriz (Derbez) studies in an expensive private school, paid by Mercedes. Obviously, young Beatriz doesn't know about her sister's job. Troubles begin when Mercedes wins a danzon contest with Paco (Acosta), her pimp. Paco refuses to share the prize with Mercedes, so she steals the money when he's sleeping.

programme.title: La proxima victima
programme.desc: Aurelio recounts some heinous acts. Tony and Esperanza get close. Aurelio calls Monica out for helping Tony and Esperanza. Isma and Paul leave the girls high and dry. The Navy close in on the ranch but Casillas escapes.

programme.title: Casillas se queda con Isidro
programme.desc: Aurelio is on the run and relocates to another safehouse. Monica takes the kids but Mabel stops her. Isma kisses Carmen in the moment. Monica asks Omar for help. Felina kills the Arabs and Ahmed admits to Pilar's death before killing Suta.

programme.title: Sin piedad
programme.desc: Felina swears revenge for Suta. Guera sleeps with Dalvio. Omar confronts Castillo and deals with a compromising video. Monica asks Ruti to plead for mercy on behalf of Esperanza with her father.

programme.title: El momento de la verdad
programme.desc: Esperanza meets with Aurelio. Casillas give the Salvatierras one minute for goodbyes. Javi calls Eunice. Ray suggest they keep the money from Aurelio. Javi and Ruti arrive at Leandro's. Juan Carlos calls Jorge to rescue Esperanza.

programme.title: Casillas gana otra vez
programme.desc: Aurelio snipes both Jorge and Castillo. Jorge gets three more and a syringe of poison. Pina is killed. Esperanza pays her debt with three bullets. Aurelio the Champion steals the Navy helicopter, leaving Juan Carlos alive to tell the story.

programme.title: Caen en la trampa
programme.desc: Leandro hosts a summit ousting the Mexicans. Colombian suppliers cutoff Aurelio and kidnap Ruti and Javi. Felina loyalties lies with Aurelio. Tony gets invited to be the new distributor. Ruti warns her Dad, who is headed to Colombia.

programme.title: Al rescate de Rutila
programme.desc: Isma and Dalvio take Tata to a shaman. Felina arrives at LeCumbre to find Ray's old pals with Tony. Aurelio raids Leandros killing Doble30 and Penumbra. Felina kills Ray for his betrayal and captures Tony. Monica turn Leonardo over to Bull.

programme.title: La sombra de la muerte
programme.desc: Aurelio with Skinny hunt and kill Tony Castrata Pastrana. Monica and Felina kill Ninon but Cabo reemerges and shoots both women. Isma and Carmen are ambushed. Ruti and Javi's plane is targeted. Aurelio has an undercover lover.

programme.title: Sed de venganza
programme.desc: While on the hunt, Aurelio watches from afar the operations carried out by Víctor Jr; On the other hand in Mexico the President requests an explanation to Rivero its man of confidence on the operation that is carried out from three months to find the whereabouts of Mónica Robles, since the people do not believe in him due to all the problems Which have been presented in the country in recent months. While talking to one of his men, Víctor asks this guy if he already knows anything about his wife's whereabouts since he must retrieve it as he sees fit. While reviewing the organization of the event to celebrate Independence Day Paloma tells her husband not to count on his company; To attend this event. Due to her fight with a recluse Felina communicates with Lourdes since she feels insecure to be there, since she believes that at some point they can kill her.

programme.title: El blanco es Esperanza
programme.desc: Esperanza spots Dalvio and the Maras. Dalvio and Roto try to retreat but the Maras attack full force. BabyGirl is wounded. Tony and Esperanza escape. Ruti visits Javier in Colombia. Aurelio and Mabel arrive in Mexico City.

programme.title: Infiltrados?
programme.desc: Eunice asks Simon for evidence. Ruti enjoys the jungle with Javi. Juan Carlos finds Aurelio's ranch but not on his terms. Jorge questions Arelis. Skinny tries to get BabyGurl out of the hospital but she is killed by Tony's sicario.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Bebé a bordo
programme.desc: En el segundo día del diplomado de Silvia, Luisito Jr. queda al cuidado de Pedrito, pero este permite que todos los vecinos lo cuiden y en un descuido pierden al bebé.

programme.title: Atorón
programme.desc: Es el aniversario de Benito y de Liz, pero él no tiene dinero para festejarlo, por lo que ella le pone un ultimátum para continuar con su relación. Luis y Magda discuten porque ambos quieren usar las escaleras.

programme.title: Primera palabra
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: El bautizo
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento? Benito abandona la vecindad por siempre.

programme.title: No se vende

programme.title: Regresó Ale

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Cumple Magda
programme.desc: Los vecinos le preparan una fiesta sorpresa a 'Doña Magda' con todo y payaso y piñata. Liz y Lorena participan en un casting para Blancanieves.

programme.title: La visita

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Movie The Perfect Mate
programme.desc: Hope (Brittany Lucio) is a control freak and a perfectionist and nothing would please her more than bringing the perfect Christian future husband home for the weekend to meet her father Reverend Adams (Lawrence Hilton-Jacobs), her mother Mrs. Adams (Jackee Harry), and sister Cherish (KD Aubert). On the day they're scheduled to leave she's dumped by her fiancé. That's when she enlists the help of her platonic male friend, Jesse (Chico Benymon), who is the epitome of everything ungodly, to impersonate her ex, the upcoming pastor. While there, he learns to appreciate family and faith in this hilarious Christian Romance Comedy.
